title: angelica roseana
intro: Angelica roseana, also known as Angelica root or Dong Quai, is a type of flowering plant native to China and other parts of Asia, belonging to the carrot family. It has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and anti-bacterial properties. The health benefits of Angelica roseana include reducing menstrual cramps and other symptoms associated with PMS, as well as supporting the immune system and reducing stress and anxiety. In herbal preparations, Angelica roseana can be consumed as a tea, capsule, or tincture, often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
